markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new CVE article generation pipeline and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New CVE Pipeline Ready:** A new pipeline auto-generates CVE articles from GitHub, enforcing writing guidelines for higher quality and consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**Review Required:** SentinelOne must review the first 250 staged articles and the new writing guidelines before the full 750-article batch is generated.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Strategic Decision Needed:** After review, SentinelOne must decide whether to prioritize new content or refresh the existing 750 articles with the new format.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [**Q4 Reporting & 2025 Planning:** January will feature a Q4 performance review and a 2025 strategic planning session, contingent on SentinelOne's internal goal-setting.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)

## Topics

### New CVE Article Pipeline

  - [**Problem:** Inconsistent quality in the first batch of 750 CVE articles, which did not fully follow writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new pipeline auto-generates articles from GitHub, enforcing guidelines for consistent quality.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [**Key Improvements:**](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [Higher technical depth and more actionable guidance.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [Improved readability from a refined writing model.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [A process diagram explaining the data flow (GitHub → article generation).](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [**Staged for Review:** The first 250 articles from the new pipeline are in Contentstack for SentinelOne's review.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

### Review & Publication Plan

  - [**SentinelOne's Review Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
    1.  [Review the 250 staged articles and the new writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
    2.  [Provide feedback to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Decision Point:** After review, SentinelOne must choose between two priorities:](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Option A:** Continue generating new content.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Option B:** Refresh the existing 750 articles with the new format.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [**Content Note:** Ankit requested that SentinelOne product capabilities not be integrated into CVE articles yet, unless contextually relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)

### General Content Updates

  - [**"Key Takeaway" Section:**](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [**Purpose:** A "good to have" section for articles directly related to SentinelOne products, used to include a CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
      - [**Decision:** Will remain ad hoc, not a standard requirement.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Airtable Status:** Mansi updated Airtable; GrowthX can now move published articles to the "Published" column.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [**Product Description Doc:** Ashley (PM, Prompt Engineering) is creating the doc; Mansi will share it with GrowthX upon receipt.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

### January Planning

  - [**Q4 Performance Review:**](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [**Timing:** First two weeks of January.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [**Scope:** Monthly reporting plus a "quarter-in-review" for all content efforts, including CVEs.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**2025 Strategic Planning:**](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Align GrowthX's work with SentinelOne's 2025 goals (e.g., new product launches, marketing strategy).](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
      - [**Timing:** Late January or February.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
      - [**Contingency:** SentinelOne's financial year ends in January, so internal goal-setting may not be complete until then.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Share the meeting agenda page (with links to documents) on Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
      - [Send an async holiday work plan by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
      - [Schedule the Q4 performance review for early January.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [Follow up in late January to schedule the 2025 planning session.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [**Mansi:**](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [Review the 250 staged CVE articles and the new writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [Provide feedback to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
      - [Share the product description doc upon receipt.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)
  - [**SentinelOne Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [Decide on the priority for the CVE project: new content vs. refreshing existing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/c5ZspxjZjJRrYM7HUHh2Vzu5yv26teZP?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
